abstract: Pass/fail review gate for Elixir code built on Reactor (~> 1.0): two blind reviewers judge a diff or file set against 28 decidable rules that catch wrong assumptions about the library's saga and dataflow model — compensation vs undo semantics, retry discipline under the max_retries :infinity default, DAG dependencies vs lexical order, step and middleware return contracts, DSL composition (compose/map/switch/recurse) over hand-rolled control flow, and async defaults — each rule carrying the artifact evidence that decides PASS/FAIL/N/A with fail-closed carve-outs. Siblings adversarial-elixir and adversarial-beam gate paradigm fit and runtime semantics.
